description_long: This chest of drawers features a robust, rectangular wooden body with a natural, rustic finish, showcasing visible wood grain and knots. The corners and edges are reinforced with thick, metallic brackets, giving it an industrial look and added durability. Each side is fitted with large, metal ring handles, suggesting ease of movement or repositioning. The top and sides are flat, with the wood panels bordered by the metal framework, and the front and back panels are similarly constructed. The drawers are not individually outlined, but the presence of handles on both sides implies access from either direction. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or industrial lofts.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style wooden chest of drawers with metal reinforcements and large ring handles on each side, featuring a rustic wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat wooden panel framed by metal brackets and two prominent metal ring handles on each side.
description_view_1: Side/top-angled view highlighting the wood grain on the top surface and the thickness of the metal brackets.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with a flat wooden panel and metal framing, but no visible handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side/top-angled view, again showing the wood grain and metal brackets, with handles visible on the side.
